sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60801" key="kunage/sion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κῠνᾱγέσιον</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κυνᾱγέτας</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κυνᾱγέτις</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κυνᾱγία</orth>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">κυνηγ</itype>-.</entryFree>
